708.reason: [Incorrect lookahead condition: using peek(2) to detect Decl is unreliable and doesn't match grammar rules; Decl starts with 'const', 'int', or 'char', not based on LPARENT two tokens ahead]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead condition: using peek(2) to detect Decl is unreliable and doesn't match grammar rules; Decl starts with 'const', 'int', or 'char', not based on LPARENT two tokens ahead]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead condition: using peek(2) to decide Decl parsing is not aligned with grammar; Decl can appear as long as the token is 'const', 'int', or 'char', regardless of what comes two tokens ahead]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead condition: using peek(2) to detect Decl is unreliable because it assumes the third token ahead is LPARENT, but Decl starts with CONSTTK/INTTK/CHARTK and doesn't necessarily relate to LPARENT two tokens ahead. This may cause premature termination or infinite loop.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead condition: using peek(2) to detect function definitions is unreliable and doesn't properly distinguish between Decl and FuncDef. Should check for CONSTTK, INTTK, or CHARTK for Decl, and VOIDTK, INTTK, or CHARTK followed by IDENFR and LPARENT for FuncDef]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead condition: using peek(2) to decide Decl parsing is arbitrary and doesn't align with grammar; may cause premature termination or infinite loop]

714.reason: [Incorrect lookahead condition: FuncDef parsing should continue until MainFuncDef is found, but checking only next token for MAINTK may skip valid FuncDefs or include invalid ones; also fails if tokens are exhausted]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead condition: FuncDef parsing should continue until MainFuncDef is found, but checking only next token for MAINTK may skip valid FuncDefs or include invalid ones; also fails if tokens are exhausted]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead condition: FuncDef parsing should continue while valid function definitions exist, not just until MAINTK appears in the next token; this fails when there are no FuncDefs or when FuncDef structure doesn't match this arbitrary lookahead]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead condition: using peek(1) to detect FuncDef termination is flawed because MAINTK may not appear immediately after FuncDef; also, if there are no FuncDefs, this condition might incorrectly try to parse a FuncDef when next token isn't MAINTK but something else valid like RBRACE or EOF.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead condition: using peek(1) to detect MAINTK doesn't account for the fact that FuncDef might not be present, and this condition may cause infinite loops or premature termination. Should check if current token sequence matches FuncDef pattern instead]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrect lookahead condition: using peek(1) to detect MAINTK for FuncDef termination is unreliable; FuncDef starts with FuncType (void/int/char), not directly with identifier followed by '(' in all cases, and main function must appear exactly once at the end]
